summary: Cycle 97 v9 (a) batch wrapper hypothesis: WIRE-OK, RENDER-FAIL. v9 envelope structurally delivered (array→object change confirmed), but tRPC client throws new error class. Mission PROTECTED — NO real LLM PII fallback (zero PII analysis content anywhere). v9 is no worse than v7 security-wise, but also no better UX-wise. Critical new diagnostic: error message points at ?batch=1 endpoint shape mismatch.

network.response_envelope: v9 single object: {result:{data:{json:{chatId, title:'⚠️ 보안 경고', messages:[{role:'assistant', content:'⚠️ 민감…보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.', contentChunks:[{type:'text', text:'⚠️…차단되었습니다.'}]}], status:'active', model:null, …}}}}

console_error_verbatim.cause: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object at Object...
console_error_verbatim.name: TRPCClientError
console_error_verbatim.message: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
console_error_verbatim.stack_excerpt: TRPCClientError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object...

key_findings.1_envelope_wire_delivery: v9 envelope IS delivered on the wire — array→object change (v7 '[{...}]' → v9 '{...}') structurally confirmed; size, warning title, content all present in payload.

2_failure_class_comparison.v9: TRPCClientError 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object'
2_failure_class_comparison.diagnostic_insight: v9 new message strongly suggests root cause: tRPC client requested ?batch=1 which contracts an ARRAY response; sending a single OBJECT makes the batch unmarshal try Object.keys(undefined) → TypeError

key_findings.3_no_v8_regression: Zero real LLM PII analysis content anywhere — engine team does NOT need emergency v9→v7 revert. Both versions equally safe.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: v9 doesn't achieve warning-bubble UX win. Endpoint ?batch=1 expects array; v9 single object breaks batch unmarshal.
next_steps: Path A: keep v9 object wrapper but route off ?batch=1 (use non-batch tRPC endpoint)
Path B: revert to v7 array but ADD missing top-level fields (shape/data/meta) inside each array element — v9 error message points at exactly that missing-field probe inside tRPC's deserializer
recommendation.mission_critical: No emergency revert needed. v9 safe to leave in place while engine team decides Path A vs B.
recommendation.checklist_impact: Per checklist §2: cycle 97 (a) batch wrapper hypothesis NARROWED — actionable diagnostic for cycle 97 (b) iteration.
